description_long: This lamppost features a robust, square base supporting a vertical wooden post reinforced with dark metallic bands. At the top, a decorative metallic finial sits above a horizontal arm, also made of wood and metal, which extends outward to support a single lantern-style light fixture. The lantern has a classic, slightly tapered design with frosted glass panels and a metallic frame, hanging from a short bracket. The overall construction combines wood and metal, giving it a traditional yet sturdy appearance suitable for parks or historic urban areas. The metallic elements are dark and matte, contrasting with the warm brown wood. The design is both functional and decorative, with subtle ornamental touches at the joints and finial.
description: A traditional lamppost with a wooden post, dark metal reinforcements, and a hanging lantern-style light fixture. Decorative metallic accents and a classic lantern design give it a historic, elegant look.
description_view_0: Front view shows the vertical post, square base, and the lantern hanging directly in the center beneath the horizontal arm.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the full extension of the horizontal arm, the hanging lantern, and the decorative finial on top.
description_view_2: Rear view highlights the solid wooden post, metal bands, and the absence of the lantern, which is hidden from this angle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the lantern, arm, and finial, with clear visibility of the mounting and bracket details.
attribute_lamp_head_design: Classic lantern with frosted glass panels and a dark metallic frame, slightly tapered and suspended from a bracket.
